privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated SEC EDGAR 13F XML filings data injected into an Oracle database. The target company is Apple Inc. with CUSIP 037833100, which is confirmed against both the task's database setup scripts and external knowledge. The task requires detecting scale errors using an anomaly threshold multiplier of 50, as explicitly stated in the task description. The final results must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/exports/aapl_top_holders.csv, which is strictly checked by the export_result.sh script.
